message: Let's agree to trade at 70 every round for mutual benefit over 20 rounds.
I won't accept 70. My valuation is 63. I'll only trade at prices at most 63. I propose we trade at 60 every round.
I will bid 63 every round. Please ask 60 so we trade around 61-62. I won't accept asks above 63. Agree to 60 each round and we'll both profit over 20 rounds.
Agreed. Last round's 62 worked. I'll ask 61, you bid 63, for trade at 62 every round. Both profit over 20 rounds.
I'll bid 61 each round. If you ask >61 I'll bid 59 next round. Please ask 61 so we trade at 61 every round.
Agreed. I'll ask 61, you bid 61, for trade at 61 every round. Steady profits for both over remaining rounds.
I'll bid 61 this round and every round. If you ask >61 I'll drop to 59 next time. Ask 61 now so we keep earning 2 each round.
